disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Blacked out and fell to the floor while standing up to get water
trigger_question_examples: Did you black out or lose consciousness?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I stood up for some water, everything spun, and the next thing I knew I was on the floor.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Neighbour reports she is suddenly muddled and unsure of the date and time, which is new for her
trigger_question_examples: Does she seem herself, or is she confused?
Is she clear about where she is and what day it is?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She keeps losing track of the day and seems foggy — that's not like her at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Passing much less urine than usual, dark and strong-smelling, over the past day
trigger_question_examples: How much urine has she passed today?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Hardly any, and what there is is very dark and strong.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Intensely thirsty for two days but has barely been drinking — the water jug is untouched
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been parched for days but the jug's still full — I just haven't been drinking.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound whole-body weakness and cramping in both calves
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm completely wiped out and my calves keep cramping up.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Has kept taking her daily water tablet and blood pressure tablet despite barely drinking
trigger_question_examples: Has she kept taking her tablets while she has been unwell?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I take my water tablet and my blood pressure tablet every day — I didn't stop them.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone; the house has been extremely hot and the air conditioning is switched off during a heatwave
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's boiling in here — the air con's been off — and she lives on her own.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Denies chest pain, palpitations, and denies hitting her head in the fall
trigger_question_examples: Any chest pain or a racing heart?
Did she hit her head when she fell?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No chest pain and my heart didn't race — and no, I don't think I hit my head.
